radicchio-salad-with-beans-figs-and-waln.name: Radicchio Salad With Beans, Figs, And Walnuts

ingredients.item: Leftover beans from bean and walnut salad with fried eggs

instructions: Toss beans, radicchio, and figs with vinaigrette.

ragu-family-chili-mac.name: Ragú® Family Chili Mac

ingredients.item: Ragú® old world style® traditional sauce

instructions: Cook ground beef in large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, until done.
Stir in sauce and chili powder. Bring to a boil over high heat. Reduce heat to low and simmer covered 10 minutes.
Stir in macaroni and heat through. Serve, if desired, with sour cream and shredded cheddar cheese.

raisin-and-carrot-cake-lezzet.name: Raisin And Carrot Cake
instructions: 1. Egg and powder sugar in a large bowl of sugar to completely melt rub.
2. If you cool the moltip Terem Oil Banquet, vanilla, baking powder, cinnamon, beansless dried grape and styrene you reinde.
3. Share mortar oil paper muffin molds.
4. Bake 30-35 minutes in the oven heated above175 degrees.
5. Pure coconut and carrot ornamental.

ranchero-sauce.name: Ranchero Sauce

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Cook bacon in a large skillet over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until slightly browned and grease forms in the skillet, about 5 minutes. Add onion; cook and stir onion in bacon grease until onion is transparent, 5 to 10 minutes, while continuing to cook bacon until crisp and browned. Remove bacon from the skillet to drain on a paper towel-lined plate; crumble.
Stir chopped tomatoes, tomato sauce, cilantro, jalapeño pepper, crumbled bacon, salt, and black pepper into onion in the skillet. Bring to a simmer and cook until flavors blend, about 15 minutes.

raspberry-hibiscus-poke-cake.name: Raspberry-hibiscus Poke Cake

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 325°. Butter a 13x9" baking dish. Whisk flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a medium bowl to combine.

Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat sugar and remaining 1 cup butter in a large bowl until light and fluffy, about 4 minutes. Add egg whites, one at a time, beating to blend after each addition and scraping down sides and bottom of bowl occasionally, until very light and airy, about 3 minutes. Beat in lemon zest, vanilla extract, and almond extract.

Reduce mixer speed to low, add dry ingredients in 3 additions, alternating with buttermilk in 2 additions, starting and ending with dry ingredients. Increase speed to medium-high; beat 2 minutes. Scrape batter into prepared pan and smooth out evenly to edges.
Bake cake until golden brown and a tester inserted into center comes out clean, 45–55 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack and let cake cool in pan 15 minutes.

While the cake is cooling, place raspberries in a fine-mesh sieve set over a medium bowl. Using a wooden spoon, press down on raspberries until you have 1 cup juice; discard solids (or save for another use). Sprinkle gelatin over; let sit 10 minutes.

Meanwhile, stir sugar, hibiscus flowers, and 1½ cups boiling water in a small bowl to combine and let sit 10 minutes. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into bowl with raspberry mixture; discard solids. Whisk until filling is smooth.
Using a chopstick, poke holes down into cake at 1" intervals. Slowly pour filling over cake, letting it seep into holes. Chill cake while you make the topping to let the filling set up a bit.

Heat marshmallows, vanilla extract, and ½ cup cream in a medium saucepan over medium, stirring constantly, until marshmallows are melted, about 3 minutes; chill remaining 1 cup cream until ready to use. Let marshmallow cream cool, about 30 minutes.
Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat chilled 1 cup cream in a large bowl until soft peaks form. Scrape in marshmallow cream and beat until almost stiff.

Turn cake out onto a platter. Turn right side up and spoon marshmallow whipped cream on top. Spread to edges, making dips and swirls.
Do ahead: Cake (without topping) can be made 2 days ahead. Wrap tightly and chill.

raw-butternut-squash-salad.name: Raw Butternut Squash Salad
instructions: Whisk chile, garlic, orange zest, orange juice, vinegar, oil, and salt in a large bowl to combine. Using a peeler, slice lengthwise strips off long neck of squash to make long ribbons until you have 8 cups (9 oz.). Add to bowl with dressing and toss to coat. Let sit, tossing occasionally, at least 30 minutes and up to 1 hour to tenderize and marinate.
Toss in roasted pumpkin seeds, then using tongs, transfer to a serving platter; discard any excess dressing left in bowl.

real-tiramisu-lezzet.name: Real Tiramisu

ingredients.item: 8-10 eggs (white and yellow of the tube separately)

instructions: 1. Firstly add egg whites to a large container and add &ccedil with the mixer.
2. Boil powder sugar and water.
3. Köpü add the inner of the egg white starting to be eaten, add sugary water mixture and continue to swear.
4. Take the egg mixture from the cream schanti consistency to the i&ccedil of another container and wait in the refrigerator.
5. With the mixer of the egg yolks and the resemblance.
6. Boiled sugar juice, add to the egg's u and light mole to crack.
7. Add the i&ccedil of egg yolk from the cream consistency; to the masscarpone cheese.
8. Mix materials with Spatula.
9. Add the mixture to the egg white &uuml.
10. Mix the remaining egg white mixture in the bottom, in the future.
11. 11. 11. 11. Catdili biscu immerse thevis in the cold espresso and index the interior of borcam.
12. Biscuts and snacks.
12. August Add the cream to the catdili biscu, which has been immersed in the espresso again, index and on.
14 July Wait and serve at least two hours of refrigerator.
15.  Afiyet olsun.

real-welsh-rarebit.name: Real Welsh Rarebit
instructions: Melt butter in a saucepan over low heat. Stir in flour, salt, pepper, mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and hot pepper sauce. Cook and stir until smooth and bubbly, about 5 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the heat. Gradually stir in milk, then return to heat and stir continuously until mixture comes to a boil. Slowly pour in beer; cook and stir for 1 minute.
Melt Cheddar cheese into mixture in small portions until completely incorporated. Set the oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler.
Toast bread slices on 1 side. Arrange on a baking sheet with the untoasted side facing up.
Spoon cheese sauce over untoasted side.
Cook under the preheated broiler until cheese sauce is bubbling and golden, 2 to 3 minutes. Serve hot.

recipe-for-baked-rigatoni-with-meat-and-.name: Recipe For Baked Rigatoni With Meat And Cheese
recipe-for-baked-rigatoni-with-meat-and-.original_name: Receta de rigatoni al horno con carne y queso

ingredients.item: 200 gr de carne molida de res ((preferiblemente 80/20 en grasa))
1/2 cdita  de albahaca seca o fresca picada
1 pint of ground chili or dry chili (optional, for a hot touch)
40 g ricotta or receson cheese (optional but recommended)

instructions: It cooks rigatoni in abundant water with salt until it's at dente, about 9 to 10 minutes. Drain and reserve.
In a large frying pan, heat up some olive oil. Add onion and purge with medium heat until clear.
It incorporates garlic and ground meat. Cooking with a good crumbling of meat till it's golden and well cooked.
Add tomato dough and tomato purée. Mix well and let it simmer slightly.
Add sugar, oregano, basil, ground bean if you use it, salt and pepper. Cooking low heat for 10 minutes to integrate flavors.
It purifies the oven at 190 and 3 and (191 and 3).
Mezcla los rigatoni cocidos con la salsa y 50 g del queso mozzarella.
En una fuente para horno engrasada, coloca la mitad de la pasta, luego una capa de ricotta en cucharadas y un poco de mozzarella adicional.
Agrega el resto de la pasta y cubre con el mozzarella restante y el queso parmesano.
Hornea for 20 minutes, till cheeses are melted and bubbling. If you want an extra gold plate, put the oven into grill for the last 3 minutes.
Let rest for 5 minutes before serving so that the preparation will be established and will not be broken after cutting.

recipe-for-beef-skewers-with-mushrooms-a.name: Recipe For Beef Skewers With Mushrooms And Soy Sauce
recipe-for-beef-skewers-with-mushrooms-a.original_name: Receta de brochetas de carne de res con setas y salsa de soja

ingredients.item: Palillos de brocheta  (de madera o metal)

instructions: We start this production by cutting beef and red onion into large pieces.
In a bowl, mix soya sauce, sesame oil, chopped garlic, salt and pepper. Add the beef cubes and leave marinating in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes.
Mientras tanto, lava y corta las setas en trozos medianos. Una vez listo el marinado, alterna en los palillos las setas, la carne marinada y los trozos de cebolla roja.
It purifies the grill or frying pan with medium-high heat. Cooking the brocketas for about 10 minutes, sometimes turning them to be cooked evenly.
Once the meat is cooked and the mushrooms are tender, remove the brushes from the fire and serve hot.

recipe-for-chocolate-bonbons-comedera.name: Recipe For Chocolate Bonbons
recipe-for-chocolate-bonbons-comedera.original_name: Receta de bombones caseros de chocolate
instructions: En una olla incorpora la crema de leche y lleva a fuego medio. Agrega la ralladura de naranja y mezcla.
Cooking till it's broken. At that time, add the semi-bitter chocolate and mix up till frying and form a cream. Turn off and let them rest for a few minutes.
Check that semi-bitter chocolate has been completely fused. When at room temperature, fill with the mixture the mold of the chocolates.
Once you have filled them up, lead to cooling for about 1 hour.
When about an hour of cooling has passed, melt chocolate into a pot with milk and butter to a clear blend.
Take the chocolates out of the refrigerator and crumble. Remove each chocolates with a mixture of chocolate and butter until they are covered and place them in a plate with matt paper.
Una vez listos, lleva nuevamente a la nevera por unos 20 minutos hasta que se terminen de refrigerar y listo.
You can leave your chocolates as well or decorate them with white chocolate or topping your choice.

recipe-for-onions-stuffed-with-polenta-a.name: Recipe For Onions Stuffed With Polenta And Vegetables
recipe-for-onions-stuffed-with-polenta-a.original_name: Receta de cebollas rellenas de polenta y verduras

ingredients.item: 1 cdita de aceite de oliva (extra virgen)

instructions: To purify the oven at 180 been 3 been.
Peel onions and cut top. With the help of a spoon, empty the centre leaving a cape of about 2-3 exterior layers intact. Reserve the extracted pulp and cut it finely.
Colocar las cebollas en una bandeja con un poco de aceite de oliva y hornear durante 15 minutos para que se suavicen.
En una cacerola, calentar el caldo de verduras hasta que hierva.
Agregar la polenta en forma de lluvia y remover constantemente para evitar grumos.
Add butter, nutmeg and parmesan cheese (if used).
In a frying pan with some olive oil, soften the chopped onion pulp, frosted carrot, mushrooms and spinach till they are tender.
Mezclar estas verduras con la polenta cocida y sazonar con sal y pimienta al gusto.
Sacar las cebollas del horno y rellenarlas con la mezcla de polenta y verduras.
Roast with some olive oil and bake for 10 more minutes, till they are slightly golden.
Retirar del horno y servir calientes.

recipe-for-oven-roasted-vegetables-with-.name: Recipe For Oven Roasted Vegetables With Herbs
recipe-for-oven-roasted-vegetables-with-.original_name: Receta de vegetales asados al horno con hierbas
instructions: To purify the oven at 200 been 3 been
Peel the onion and cut into cubes. Clean up the peppers and cut them into medium pieces.
Peel carrot and cut into cuts, as do mushrooms.
He cuts his pumpkin into cubes and cuts his teeth with garlic.
En un bol, incorpora todos los vegetales junto a los dientes de ajo.
Agrega todas las hierbas, la sal marina, la pimienta y el aceite de oliva. Mezcla todo muy bien hasta que queden impregnados.
Redistribute the vegetables into a plate with baking paper, or you can use a ceramic or glass plate.
The plants are baked from 25 to 30 minutes to 200 ″ 3 ″ or until they are soft and slightly at dente.
Mientras se hornean, debes ir moviendo los vegetales para se distribuyan muy bien.
Una vez listos, retira del horno y sirve caliente.

recipe-for-savory-crepes-stuffed-with-sp.name: Recipe For Savory Crepes Stuffed With Spinach And Ricotta
recipe-for-savory-crepes-stuffed-with-sp.original_name: Receta de crepes salados rellenos de espinaca y ricotta

ingredients.item: 70 g wheat flour (may be replaced by whole or oatmeal for a lighter version)
120 ml whole milk ((vegetable milk without sugar can be used for a lighter choice))
1 cdita de mantequilla derretida o aceite de oliva
150 gr de espinaca fresca ((puede ser congelada bien escurrida))
100 g fresh ricotta (can also be replaced with soft demand)
Sal y pimienta negra al gusto

instructions: In a bowl, beat the egg with milk, add the flour and pint of salt and mix up to achieve a smooth and homogenous mass. Repose for 15 minutes.
Warm up a non-stick frying pan, grease slightly and pour a tablespoon of dough. Cooking each crepe for 1-2 minutes per side until they are golden. Reserve.
To fill up, heat up olive oil in a frying pan and soften garlic till fragrant. Add the spinach and split till reduced. Withdraw from fire.
Escurrir bien la espinaca, picarla finamente y mezclar con la ricotta, el parmesano, la nuez moscada, la sal y la pimienta.
Filling each crepe with spinach and ricotta mixture, bending at triangles or rolling as a cylinder.
Serve as, or put into an oven-free fountain, cover with some cheese and gratify 5 minutes for a more creamy version.

recipe-for-zucchini-stuffed-with-shrimp-.name: Recipe For Zucchini Stuffed With Shrimp And Chicken
recipe-for-zucchini-stuffed-with-shrimp-.original_name: Receta de calabacines rellenos de gambas y pollo
instructions: Lava los calabacines, retira cada punta y corta a la mitad hacia lo largo.
Con la ayuda de un cuchillo o cuchara, retira un poco de la pulpa.
Cut the pumpkin pulp and reserve.
Pela la cebolla y corta en cuadritos. Filete los dientes de ajo.
The chicken breast, cut it into cubes. Clean up the shrimp and lava.
Warm up some olive oil in a frying pan and skip onion and garlic teeth for about 3 minutes.
It incorporates the pumpkin and jumps for a few minutes.
Add cut chicken breast with salt and pepper to suit. Mix and cook for about 6 minutes.
When the chicken's golden, pour the milk cream and mix really well.
Cocina a fuego medio - bajo hasta que se vaya haciendo crema.
Pasado unos 4 minutos, agrega las gambas y rectifica de sal y pimienta.
Finish cooking for a few minutes till you have a creamy paddle or till the shrimp are at the dente.
Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
Rellena los calabacines y esparce el queso mozzarella rallado.
Hornea por unos 10 a 12 minutos hasta que gratinen.
Once ready, enjoy them!

red-lentil-soup-with-preserved-lemon-and.name: Red Lentil Soup With Preserved Lemon And Crispy Garlic

ingredients.item: Good-quality low-sodium vegetable or chicken broth
Torn mixed tender herbs (such as basil

instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium. Cook 2 medium onions, chopped, 4 garlic cloves, finely chopped, and one 2" piece ginger, scrubbed, finely chopped, stirring occasionally, until onions are softened, 6–8 minutes. Add 2 tsp. ground cumin and ¾ tsp. ground turmeric and stir to coat onions. Season with freshly ground black pepper. Add ½ preserved lemon, rinsed, seeds removed, finely chopped, and 3 Tbsp. double-concentrated tomato paste and cook, stirring often, until tomato paste is darkened in color, about 4 minutes.

Add 8 cups good-quality low-sodium vegetable or chicken broth and 2 cups red lentils, rinsed, and bring to a boil, skimming foam from surface as needed. Reduce heat to medium-low, partially cover, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until lentils are very tender and soup is almost creamy, 35–45 minutes.

While the lentils are cooking, heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a small saucepan over medium. Cook 4 garlic cloves, thinly sliced, stirring often, until golden and starting to crisp, about 3 minutes; remove pan from heat. Using a slotted spoon, transfer garlic chips to paper towels, leaving oil behind. Lightly season garlic chips with kosher salt. Stir 1 tsp. Aleppo-style pepper into infused oil in pan and set aside.

Remove soup from heat and stir in 1 cup torn mixed tender herbs (such as basil, dill, cilantro, and/or parsley). If soup is too thick, thin with water. Taste and add up to ½ preserved lemon, rinsed, seeds removed, finely chopped, if desired (you may find the soup lemony enough as it is). Season with more salt if needed.
Ladle soup into bowls. Top with garlic chips and more herbs and drizzle over reserved pepper oil.

rhubarb-coffee-cake.name: Rhubarb Coffee Cake
instructions: To make the topping: Combine brown sugar, cinnamon, butter, and flour in a small bowl. Mix well and set topping aside.
Place rhubarb into a small bowl and add 1 tablespoon flour. Mix well and set aside.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a fluted tube pan (such as Bundt) and set aside.

Cream sugar and butter in a large bowl with an electric mixer until smooth. Add yogurt, eggs, and vanilla extract; blend until smooth. Add remaining flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt; mix until flour has been incorporated. Fold in rhubarb. Pour batter into the prepared pan and sprinkle with topping.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 55 to 60 minutes. Cool slightly in the pan. Run a table knife around the edges to loosen. Invert carefully onto a serving plate or cooling rack. Let cool completely.

rhubarb-custard-pie.name: Rhubarb Custard Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C).
Place rhubarb into pie crust. Combine 1 ¼ cups sugar, evaporated milk, egg yolks, flour, and ½ teaspoon salt in a bowl; pour over rhubarb. Place pie onto a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven for 12 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 177°C (175 degrees C); bake 30 minutes more. Transfer pie to a wire rack. Reduce oven temperature to 163°C (165 degrees C).
Beat egg whites in a separate bowl until frothy. Slowly add 6 tablespoons sugar, ½ teaspoon salt, and cream of tartar; beat until stiff peaks form. Spread over baked pie.
Bake in the preheated oven until light golden brown, about 15 minutes. Cool slightly before serving.

rhubarb-strawberry-compote.name: Rhubarb Strawberry Compote
instructions: Combine rhubarb, sugar, and vanilla sugar in a large pot; set aside for 30 minutes.
Stir apple juice into rhubarb mixture; bring to a boil over low heat. Simmer until rhubarb is soft, 4 to 5 minutes.
Whisk cornstarch and water together in a small bowl until well combined; stir into rhubarb mixture. Bring to a boil, then remove from heat. Cool completely.
Stir in strawberries before serving.

rice-with-peppers-djuvec-style-pequerece.name: Rice With Peppers Djuvec Style
rice-with-peppers-djuvec-style-pequerece.original_name: Arroz con pimientos al estilo Djuvec

ingredients.item: 150 g de ajvar (pasta de pimiento asado)
2 cucharadas de concentrado de tomate (o pasta de tomate)
300 g de arroz de grano largo

instructions: It pics onion and garlic teeth into thin dice. Cut the red pepper into small pieces and chew the tomatoes accordingly. Warm up oil or butter in a large frying pan and fry onion and garlic till clear and then add crisp and crisped tomatoes and scattering them briefly.
It incorporates tomato concentrate and pimenton. It removes well and let some moments be felt so that the aromas are properly integrated.
Add the rice to the frying pan and mix well with the sodith so that it impregnates from the color and taste. Then pour the vegetable stock.
It takes the mixture to ebullition, reduces the fire and adds the Ajvar, stirring to be distributed evenly.
Cover the frying pan and let them cook at low heat for about 15-20 minutes, till the rice's at its best.
Five minutes before completion of cooking, incorporates frozen peas. That way they will be cooked with a firm texture.
It pics to taste and, just before serving, adds minced parsley.

ricotta-cornmeal-pound-cake.name: Ricotta Cornmeal Pound Cake

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
Lightly whipped cream and/or lemon curd

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 325°. Lightly coat an 8½x4½" loaf pan with nonstick spray, then line with parchment paper, leaving overhang on long sides.

Whisk flour, cornmeal, baking powder, and salt into a small bowl. Using an electric mixer, beat butter and sugar in a large bowl on medium speed until light and fluffy, about 5 minutes. Add eggs and egg yolk one at a time, mixing to fully incorporate before adding the next. Scrape down sides of bowl, add half of dry ingredients, and beat on low speed just to combine. Add sour cream and remaining dry ingredients and mix 1 minute. Scrape down sides of bowl, add ricotta and vanilla, and mix until well combined. Scrape batter into prepared pan; smooth surface.

Bake cake 40 minutes. Rotate pan and continue to bake cake until golden brown all over and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 20–30 minutes more. (Baking the cake slowly at a lower temperature yields a tender and creamy crumb and will prevent it from drying out.) Let cake cool in pan on a wire rack, at least 1 hour.

Carefully run an offset spatula or paring knife around sides of cake and use parchment paper to lift cake from pan; remove parchment. Cut cake into slices and serve topped with whipped cream and/or lemon curd if desired.
Do ahead: Cake can be baked 2 days ahead. Store tightly wrapped at room temperature, or freeze up to 2 weeks.

risotto-with-truffle-and-parmesan.name: Risotto With Truffle And Parmesan

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat chicken broth in a stockpot over medium-low heat until warmed, 3 to 5 minutes.

Heat 1 tablespoon butter and olive oil in a large, heavy-bottomed pan until butter melts. Add onion and sauté until translucent, about 2 minutes. Stir in rice until coated, then cook, stirring constantly, until fragrant, about 1 minute.

Pour wine into rice mixture; cook and stir until liquid is absorbed, about 5 minutes. Add one ladle hot broth and cook, stirring constantly, until broth is absorbed. Continue adding and stirring in one ladle broth at a time until rice is tender but firm to the bite, 20 to 30 minutes. If you run out of broth before rice is cooked, finish cooking with hot water.
Stir in Parmesan, remaining 2 tablespoons butter, truffle oil, and milk until fully incorporated, then season with parsley, salt, and pepper. Serve immediately.

roast-beef-tenderloin-with-caesar-crust.name: Roast Beef Tenderloin With Caesar Crust

ingredients.item: Freshly ground black pepper plus more for seasoning
Fine fresh breadcrumbs made from day-old white bread

instructions: Season tenderloin lightly with salt and pepper. Wrap in plastic; refrigerate overnight.
Uncover tenderloin; let stand at room temperature for 2 hours.

Preheat oven to 400°. Set a rack inside a rimmed baking sheet. Transfer tenderloin to rack. Pulse 4 tsp. black pepper and remaining ingredients in a small food processor until well blended. Generously and evenly spread and pack Parmesan mixture around tenderloin.
Roast until crust is golden brown and an instant-read thermometer inserted into thickest part of tenderloin registers 110°–115° for rare and 120°–125° for medium-rare, 30–40 minutes.
Transfer to a carving board. Let rest for 20 minutes. Cut into 1/2"-thick slices, taking care not to lose too much of the delicate crust.

roasted-asparagus.name: Roasted Asparagus

ingredients.item: Coarse sea salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C.
Arrange asparagus spears in a single layer on a large rimmed baking sheet.
Drizzle extra-virgin olive oil over the asparagus and turn to coat evenly.
Season with coarse sea salt and freshly ground black pepper.
Roast in the preheated oven, turning occasionally, until lightly browned and just tender, about 18-20 minutes.
Transfer the roasted asparagus to a platter.
To serve, drizzle aged balsamic vinegar over the hot asparagus and use a vegetable peeler to shave Parmesan over the spears.

roasted-chicken-rub.name: Roasted Chicken Rub
instructions: Stir celery flakes, salt, paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, thyme, sage, black pepper, rosemary, and cayenne pepper together in a bowl.
Transfer spice mixture to a spice grinder or food processor; blend until smooth.

roasted-fingerling-potatoes.name: Roasted Fingerling Potatoes
instructions: Place the potatoes in a large pot of salted water and bring to a boil over high heat. Boil for 5-7 minutes, then drain in a colander.
Preheat the oven to 400˚F (200˚C).
Thoroughly dry the par-boiled potatoes with a paper towel.
On a cutting board, quarter the potatoes.
Place the potatoes in a large bowl, drizzle with olive oil, and season with salt, pepper, and rosemary, stirring until well-coated.
Transfer the potatoes to a parchment-lined baking sheet and spread in an even layer.
Roast for 35-45 minutes, until crispy.
Enjoy!

roasted-pork-belly-with-gingery-rhubarb-.name: Roasted Pork Belly With Gingery Rhubarb Compote
instructions: Using a sharp knife, score pork belly fat in a crosshatch pattern at about 3/4-inch intervals, taking care not to cut into meat.
Mix thyme, sugar, salt, and pepper in a small bowl. Rub thyme mixture on both sides of pork. Place pork in a large resealable plastic bag, seal bag, and chill at least 8 hours and up to 1 day.
Preheat oven to 250°. Arrange onion in bottom of a large heavy pot with a lid. Rinse pork and place fat side up on top of onion; add wine.

Cover pot; place in oven and braise pork, basting occasionally, until fork-tender, 2 1/2-3 hours. Increase oven temperature to 400°. Uncover pot and cook until meat is very tender and fat is crisp and golden brown, about 1 hour longer.
Slice pork and serve with Gingery Rhubarb Compote.

DO AHEAD: Pork belly can be made 2 days ahead (do not slice). Let cool slightly, then chill uncovered until cold. Cover and keep chilled. Preheat oven to 350°. Reheat until hot and fat is crisp, 20-30 minutes.

roasted-red-pepper-aioli.name: Roasted Red Pepper Aioli

ingredients.prep: peeled and halved, or more to taste

instructions: Place roasted red peppers and basil in a food processor; pulse until coarsely chopped and combined. Add lemon juice; pulse 3 times. Scatter garlic halves over mixture; pulse to chop, 4 to 5 times. Add mayonnaise and sugar; pulse until smooth, 5 to 7 times. Season with salt and pepper.

roasted-spiced-rhubarb-with-dates-and-yo.name: Roasted Spiced Rhubarb With Dates And Yogurt
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast pistachios on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing occasionally, until golden brown, 8–10 minutes; let cool, then chop.

Meanwhile, bring dates, zest, vanilla, 1 Tbsp. honey, and 1 cup water to a boil in a small saucepan, reduce heat, and simmer gently until dates are very soft and liquid is reduced by half, 8–10 minutes. Place rhubarb in a small baking dish and toss with cinnamon and date mixture. Roast, turning halfway through, until rhubarb is tender but not falling apart, 25–30 minutes.
Whisk yogurt and remaining 1 Tbsp. honey in a small bowl. Serve spiced rhubarb and any juices with yogurt and pistachios.

roasted-vegetable-lasagna.name: Roasted Vegetable Lasagna
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Lightly coat a large baking sheet with cooking spray.

Arrange zucchini slices, bell pepper pieces, sliced mushrooms, and onion wedges on prepared baking sheet. Scatter basil and garlic over vegetables; coat with cooking spray. Season with salt and black pepper.
Bake in the preheated oven until vegetables are lightly browned and tender, 10 to 25 minutes.
Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook lasagna noodles in the boiling water, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 8 minutes. Drain.
Heat pasta sauce in a saucepan over medium-high heat to a simmer. Combine mozzarella and Parmesan cheeses in a bowl.

Pour 1/3 cup pasta sauce in a 9x13-inch baking dish. Layer 3 lasagna noodles over sauce to cover. Spread 1/4 roasted vegetables over noodles, top with 1/4 sauce, sprinkle 1/4 cheese mixture over sauce. Repeat layers 3 more times, ending with cheese mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheese melted and sauce is bubbly, 20 to 25 minutes. Allow lasagna to rest 10 minutes before slicing.

rooster-fish-fillets-with-sweet-potato-p.name: Rooster Fish Fillets With Sweet Potato Puree
rooster-fish-fillets-with-sweet-potato-p.original_name: Filetes de peixe-galo com puré de batata-doce
instructions: Season the fillets with salt, chopped garlic and lemon juice and reserve.

Peel the sweet potatoes, cut them into pieces and lie in a pot. Cover with water, season with salt, take it to the fire and let it cook until the potatoes are soft. Drain them and turn them into mashed potatoes. Add the milk, stirring until you get a homogeneous and creamy mixture. Season with ground pepper and nutmeg and reserve hot.

Melt the butter and olive oil in a frying pan. Add the fillets and let them cook until they gain color on both sides. Water with white wine and let it evaporate. Finally, add the lemon zest, olives and parsley leaves.
Serve the fillets immediately, accompanying them with the sweet potato puree that has in the meantime sprinkled with more nutmeg.

roti-indian-flatbread.name: Roti ( Indian Flatbread)
instructions: Stir 1½ cups atta or chapati flour, a large pinch of kosher salt, and ¾ cup warm water in a medium bowl with a wooden spoon until dough comes together into a shaggy ball.

Turn out dough onto a clean (unfloured) surface and knead until smooth and stiff but pliable, about 5 minutes (pinch your earlobe—it should have a similar softness). Divide dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each into a tight ball. Invert a large bowl over dough balls to cover; let sit 15 minutes.

Working with 1 dough ball at a time and keeping the rest covered, toss dough in a small bowl of atta to coat. Flatten ball against surface, then, using a small rolling pin, roll, rotating occasionally to create an even shape and dusting with more atta as needed to prevent sticking, into a 6"-diameter round about ⅛" thick. Place a round of dough on a parchment-lined baking sheet and cover with another piece of parchment paper or a kitchen towel to keep from drying out. (Once all rounds are on the baking sheet, they may overlap slightly.)

Heat a dry large cast-iron or stainless-steel skillet or griddle over medium. Cook a roti until dry with pale blond spots underneath (if roti moves easily in pan, it’s ready to flip), about 50 seconds. Flip and cook until second side appears dry, about 30 seconds. Flip again, increase heat to high, and cook, pressing down lightly with a spatula, until roti begins to puff and dark brown spots appear underneath, about 30 seconds. Transfer to a kitchen towel–lined plate and brush lightly with melted ghee or unsalted butter if desired. Wrap towel securely around roti to trap steam and allow roti to keep cooking. Repeat with remaining roti, stacking in towel as you go.

rump-roast.name: Rump Roast

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Whisk 1/4 cup wine, 3 tablespoons oil, 1 1/2 tablespoons kosher salt, Italian seasoning, vinegar, 1/2 teaspoon black pepper, and garlic salt together in a bowl; pour into a resealable plastic bag. Add rump roast, coat with marinade, squeeze out excess air, and seal the bag. Marinate in the refrigerator for 8 hours or overnight.
Remove roast from marinade and shake off excess. Discard remaining marinade.
Melt butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add roast; sear, turning to brown all sides, about 10 minutes.

Place roast in a slow cooker. Add carrots, celery, broth, onion, parsley, remaining 1/2 cup wine, remaining 4 tablespoons oil, garlic, salt, and pepper. Cover and cook on Low heat until roast is fall-apart tender, 9 to 10 hours. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 63°C (63 degrees C).

rutabaga-tacos.name: Rutabaga Tacos

ingredients.prep: stems and ribs removed, leaves cut into 1" pieces

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Toss rutabaga with 3 Tbsp. oil on a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet; season with salt. Roast, tossing once halfway through, until golden brown and tender, 15–20 minutes.

Meanwhile, heat remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium. Add onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until slightly softened and golden brown, 8–10 minutes. Add kale, red pepper flakes, and ⅓ cup water and cook, stirring occasionally, until kale is tender but still bright green, about 3 minutes. Add rutabaga, season with salt, and toss to combine.
Toss watercress with lime juice in a small bowl; season with salt.
Divide rutabaga mixture among tortillas. Top with watercress mixture and queso fresco. Serve with hot sauce alongside.

rye-bread-boat-dip.name: Rye Bread Boat Dip
instructions: Combine sour cream, mayonnaise, chipped beef, parsley, onion, seasoned salt, and dill in a bowl until well mixed. Chill dip in refrigerator for 24 hours.
Cut the top off rye bread loaf. Scoop out bread with hands or a spoon: break into bite-size pieces.
Add dip to hollowed-out bread 'boat.' Place bread 'boat' on a serving tray: arrange bread pieces around it.
